text: User: [Image #1] I have no idea why when launching with `tenex-edge launch` a claude or codex or anything agent harness it has no colors -- when launching without it it works normal -- this wasn't happening yesterday at all -- also notice that "[te: @te_session not set - check tenex-edge launch]" --- which happens all the time too now and was working before -- comapre with this screenshot not using tenex-edge launch e[Image #2] -- fix it and validate it works as expected by taking actual screenshots and reviewing them (use haiku agents to drive that) -- don't guess, literal actual screenshots -- no bullshit -- work in a git worktree off of `master` [...] Assistant: Good, this confirms `tenex-edge launch <slug>` is a real CLI command. Now let's set up an isolated daemon/tmux environment to reproduce the bug safely, without touching the live production fleet.
